arts.ttl: Liverpool join Barcelona in race to sign Bundesliga defender
arts.sum: Barcelona are already looking to the free agent market, as they aim to improve Hansi Flick’s squad next summer. At this stage, one of their leading targets is Jonathan Tah, whose Bayer Leverkusen contract is due to expire at the end of the season. Tah has been on Barcelona’s radar for several months, and he […] The post Liverpool join Barcelona in race to sign Bundesliga defender appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Chelsea set for Lionel Messi meeting as FIFA make huge announcement
arts.sum: FIFA have announced that Lionel Messi's Inter Miami will join Chelsea in next summer's Club World Cup. Chelsea qualified after winning the Champions League in 2021 and will join Real Madrid and Manchester City via this route.

arts.ttl: Report: Tottenham want to sign 'sensational' £30m player but he's a self-confessed Chelsea fan
Cole Palmer's Anfield admission proves Gary Neville point ahead of Liverpool vs Chelsea
arts.sum: The latest Liverpool news as the Reds host Enzo Maresca's Chelsea side in the Premier League on Sunday afternoon

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk makes Chelsea admission ahead of Premier League clash
arts.sum: Virgil van Dijk admits he has been impressed by Chelsea's improvement this season as he anticipated a tough test for Liverpool on Sunday. The Blues have enjoyed an impressive start to the season, establishing themselves as early candidates for a top-four finish and sitting just four points behind league leaders Liverpool heading into Sunday's game.

arts.ttl: Chelsea star believes Ballon d'Or win is possible
arts.sum: During his entire spell at Chelsea so far, Palmer has made 51 goal contributions in 54 games, an amount no one could have foreseen, not least Pep Guardiola, who allowed him to join a Premier League rival. Chelsea attacker Cole Palmer has made a huge claim regarding the Ballon d'Or.

arts.ttl: Alexis Mac Allister drops Liverpool team news hint for Chelsea after injury worry
arts.sum: The latest injury news as the midfielder is a doubt for the game after training away from the main group on Friday in the build-up to the match.

arts.ttl: Furious Mainz ultras take shot at former manager Jurgen Klopp with new banners at RB Leipzig clash as the ex-Liverpool boss takes up new Red Bull role
arts.sum: After leaving his post at Liverpool at the end of the 2023-24 season, Klopp spent a few months out of work before taking up a role as Red Bull's new Global Head of football.

arts.ttl: Chelsea's Palmer: 'Cold' celly about passion, joy
arts.sum: Chelsea forward Cole Palmer has explained why he performs his signature "cold" celebration after each goal, saying it is about showing the "joy" of football.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot makes claim over contracts 'full picture' as Liverpool face anxious wait on three deals
arts.sum: The Liverpool head coach has spoken about contract situations of Mohamed Salah, Virgil van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold
